message:
refactor(backup): apply clippy lints for cleaner code

Apply clippy suggestions to backup module:

- Use += operator instead of x = x + for DateTime arithmetic:
  - next_hourly: candidate += ChronoDuration::hours(1)
  - next_daily: candidate += ChronoDuration::days(1)

- Use Option::is_none_or instead of map_or(true, ...) for cron matching:
  - day_of_month_matches: cron.day_of_month.is_none_or(|dom| ...)
  - day_of_week_matches: cron.day_of_week.is_none_or(|dow| ...)

- Simplify sort closure: entries.sort_by(compare_backup_entries)
  instead of entries.sort_by(|a, b| compare_backup_entries(a, b))

All changes are semantically equivalent; clippy prefers these idioms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
